2604.08628.title: Retrieval Augmented Classification for Confidential Documents
2604.08628.paper_summary: Unauthorized disclosure of confidential documents demands robust, low-leakage classification. In real work environments, there is a lot of inflow and outflow of documents. To continuously update knowledge, we propose a methodology for classifying confidential documents using Retrieval Augmented Classification (RAC). To confirm this effectiveness, we compare RAC and supervised fine tuning (FT) on the WikiLeaks US Diplomacy corpus under realistic sequence-length constraints. On balanced data, RAC matches FT. On unbalanced data, RAC is more stable while delivering comparable performance--about 96% Accuracy on both the original (unbalanced) and augmented (balanced) sets, and up to 94% F1 with proper prompting--whereas FT attains 90% F1 trained on the augmented, balanced set but drops to 88% F1 trained on the original, unbalanced set. When robust augmentation is infeasible, RAC provides a practical, security-preserving path to strong classification by keeping sensitive content out of model weights and under your control, and it remains robust as real-world conditions change in class balance, data, context length, or governance requirements. Because RAC grounds decisions in an external vector store with similarity matching, it is less sensitive to label skew, reduces parameter-level leakage, and can incorporate new data immediately via reindexing--a difficult step for FT, which typically requires retraining. The contributions of this paper are threefold: first, a RAC-based classification pipeline and evaluation recipe; second, a controlled study that isolates class imbalance and context-length effects for FT versus RAC in confidential-document grading; and third, actionable guidance on RAC design patterns for governed deployments.
2604.08628.paper_summary_zh: 未經授權的機密文件披露需要強健且低洩漏的分類。在實際工作環境中，文件的流入和流出非常頻繁。為了持續更新知識，我們提出了一種使用檢索增強分類（RAC）來分類機密文件的方法。為了確認其有效性，我們在現實的序列長度限制下，將RAC與監督微調（FT）在WikiLeaks美國外交語料庫進行比較。在平衡數據上，RAC的表現與FT相當。在不平衡數據上，RAC則更穩定，同時提供可比的性能——在原始（不平衡）和增強（平衡）數據集上，準確率約為96%，並且在適當提示下F1值高達94%——而FT在增強的平衡數據集上達到90%的F1值，但在原始的不平衡數據集上下降至88%的F1值。當強健的增強不可行時，RAC提供了一條實用的、安全的強分類途徑，通過將敏感內容保持在模型權重之外並掌控在自己手中，並且隨著現實條件在類別平衡、數據、上下文長度或治理要求的變化而保持穩健。因為RAC將決策基於具有相似性匹配的外部向量存儲，因此對標籤偏斜的敏感度較低，減少了參數級別的洩漏，並且可以通過重新索引立即納入新數據——這對於FT來說是一個困難的步驟，通常需要重新訓練。本文的貢獻有三方面：首先，一個基於RAC的分類管道和評估配方；其次，一項控制研究，隔離FT與RAC在機密文件評分中的類別不平衡和上下文長度效應；第三，對於治理部署的RAC設計模式提供可行的指導。
2604.08628.author: Yeseul E. Chang et.al.
2604.08628.authors: Yeseul E. Chang, Rahul Kailasa, Simon Shim, Byunghoon Oh, Jaewoo Lee
